auth.userNotVerified: Please verify your email before logging in
auth.noAccount: User does not have an account
auth.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action
auth.emailVerificationRequired: Please verify your email to perform this action
auth.passwordRequired: Password is required and must be a string
auth.emailRequired: Email is required and must be a string
auth.githubNotConfigured: GitHub OAuth is not configured. Please contact the administrator.
auth.githubTokenExchangeFailed: Failed to exchange authorization code for access token
auth.githubNoToken: No access token received from GitHub
auth.githubUserInfoFailed: Failed to fetch user information from GitHub
auth.githubUnavailable: GitHub is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
auth.stateRequired: State parameter is required for security

validation.maxAccountsReached: User has reached maximum account limit
validation.reservedRoleName: Role name '{{roleName}}' is reserved for core platform roles and cannot be used
validation.reservedGroupName: Group name '{{groupName}}' is reserved for core platform groups and cannot be used
validation.newPasswordDifferent: New password must be different from current password
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least {{min}} characters
validation.passwordMin8: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordMin6: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.passwordMaxLength: Password must be at most {{max}} characters
validation.passwordMax128: Password must be at most 128 characters
validation.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.passwordLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
validation.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number
validation.passwordSpecialChar: Password must contain at least one special character
validation.passwordSpecialCharMin: Password must contain at least {{min}} special character(s)
validation.passwordForbiddenPatterns: Password contains forbidden patterns (e.g., too many repeated characters or common weak passwords)
validation.passwordSequential: Password must not contain sequential characters (e.g., abc, 123)
validation.displayNameMinLength: Display name must be at least {{min}} characters
validation.displayNameMin2: Display name must be at least 2 characters
validation.displayNameMaxLength: Display name must be less than {{max}} characters
validation.displayNameMax100: Display name must be less than 100 characters
validation.expirationMustBeFuture: Expiration date must be in the future
validation.slugMin2: Slug must be at least 2 characters
validation.actionInvalidFormat: Action must contain only letters, numbers, hyphens, and plus (no spaces)
validation.scopeIdInvalid: Invalid scope ID: must be a UUID or multiple UUIDs separated by colons
validation.clientSecretMin32: Client secret must be at least 32 characters
validation.colorInvalid: Color must be one of the allowed tag colors
validation.searchMin2: Search term must be at least 2 characters
validation.usernameMin3: Username must be at least 3 characters
validation.eitherUserIdOrRoleIdRequired: Either userId or roleId must be provided
validation.eitherRoleIdOrGroupIdRequired: Either roleId or groupId must be provided
validation.eitherGroupIdOrPermissionIdRequired: Either groupId or permissionId must be provided
validation.nameMin2: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.nameMin3: Name must be at least 3 characters
validation.labelMin2: Label must be at least 2 characters
validation.passwordTooLong: Password must be at most 128 characters
validation.slugInvalidFormat: Slug must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens

conflict.duplicateAuthMethod: Duplicate authentication method: A user with provider '{{provider}}' and identifier '{{providerId}}' already exists

descriptions.organizationOwner: Full control over organization and all resources within it
descriptions.organizationAdmin: Administrative access to manage organization settings and members
descriptions.organizationDev: Developer access to manage projects and resources
descriptions.organizationViewer: Read-only access to view organization resources

verification.subject: Verify your email address
verification.message: Thank you for signing up! Please verify your email address by clicking the button below:
verification.expiresIn: This link will expire in {{minutes}} minutes.
verification.alternativeText: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link:

footer.noRequest: If you didn't create an account, you can safely ignore this email.
footer.typo: Someone else might have typed your email address by mistake.

passwordReset.subject: Reset Your Password
passwordReset.message: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to create a new password:
passwordReset.expiresIn: This link will expire in {{minutes}} minutes.
passwordReset.warning: If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email. Your password will remain unchanged.

invitation.subject: You've been invited to {{organizationName}}
invitation.message: {{inviterName}} has invited you to join {{organizationName}} as a {{roleName}}.
invitation.expiresIn: This invitation will expire in {{days}} days.

footer.noRequest: If you don't recognize this invitation, you can safely ignore this email.

common.alternativeText: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link:

footer.noRequest: If you didn't request this action, you can safely ignore this email.
footer.typo: Someone else might have entered your email address by mistake.
